$comment: Asset manifest for the Delphi-OBD design-time package.
Each entry produces one PNG under assets/designtime/. The
generator script (generate.py) calls OpenAI's image API with
model 'gpt-image-2' and writes the result to <out>.
Conventions:
- 'kind' is informational; the script doesn't branch on it.
- 'size' is whatever gpt-image-2 supports natively (square
sizes only). The script downscales to 'final_size' with
Lanczos resampling. Component icons end at 16/24/32 px;
asking the model for that small produces mush, so we
generate at 1024 and downscale.
- 'transparent_background' = true makes the script add the
'background: transparent' parameter (gpt-image-2 supports
it natively for PNG). Set to false + put 'pure white
background' in the prompt when you want to chroma-key
later in a graphics tool.
- 'force' on the CLI re-runs even if 'out' exists.
Style guide for prompts (keep consistent across icons):
- Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI icon style: 2D
with subtle depth — slight isometric / dimetric tilt,
soft layered shading, clean geometric shapes. Modern
and recognisable, not flat-flat and not photoreal.
- Use ONLY colours that appear in the attached reference
logo. Don't enumerate them in the prompt — let the
model lift the palette directly from the reference.
- White background.
- Centered subject, even padding, no text.

assets.prompt: Modern Microsoft Office / Fluent UI style icon for a vehicle diagnostics software component named 'TOBDConnection'. The icon depicts a stylised OBD-II 16-pin trapezoidal diagnostic connector with a short cable. Render in the same modern Fluent icon style as Microsoft Office app icons: 2D with subtle depth, slight isometric or dimetric perspective, soft layered shading, clean geometric shapes — modern and recognisable, not flat-flat and not photoreal. Use ONLY colours from the attached reference logo; lift the palette directly from the reference. Pure white background. Centered composition, generous padding. No text. Clean enough to read at 16 by 16 pixels after downscaling.
